name: Fuzzing Scouting V2 Workflow
description: Scout V2: Contract analysis and classification (zero coding)

steps.name: Phase 0: Contract Discovery and Classification
steps.description: Discover all contracts and classify as FULL/MOCK/ABSORB/DISCARD
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/scout-v2-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the scout-v2-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will analyze the codebase and output deployment classification.

decision.NOTE: Classification file created, continue to scaffolding spec

steps.name: Phase 1: Generate Scaffolding Specification
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/scout-v2-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the scout-v2-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

decision.NOTE: Scaffolding spec created, continue to parameter analysis

steps.name: Phase 2: Deep Parameter Analysis
steps.description: Analyze constructor parameters, coverage classes, and deployment order
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./prompts/agent/scout-v2-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the scout-v2-phase-2 agent using the Task tool.

decision.NOTE: Setup config spec created, scouting complete
Setup config spec not found, retry

steps.name: Scouting V2 Complete
steps.prompt: echo 'Scout V2 complete. Output files: magic/deployment-classification.json, magic/contracts-to-scaffold.json, magic/setup-config-spec.json'
